contents.title: Hello World in Rust
contents.description: A simple guide to writing a 'Hello, World!' program in Rust

children.value: Rust is a systems programming language known for its safety, speed, and concurrency support. Writing a "Hello, World!" program in Rust is a great way to get started with the language.
Below is the simplest Rust program that prints "Hello, World!" to the console:
